lesson.menu_desc: Going to vs will -- planning a congress trip -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- Making Plans -- going to vs will
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Rubens Tofolo | Aula 6 -- Making Plans

listenings.text: Hello Doctor Rubens, this is Laura from the International Endocrinology Congress office. I am calling about the upcoming event in Lisbon. I want to confirm a few details for your trip. First, the registration deadline is next Friday, so please complete your registration online before then. Second, the venue this year is the Lisbon Convention Center, near the river. The keynote on diabetes is on the first morning, so you are going to want to arrive the day before. Third, when you book your flight, choose a departure that lands before noon, because the welcome session starts early. If the dates change, do not worry, we will not postpone the keynote. Please send me your itinerary once it is ready, and I will arrange a car from the airport to your hotel. Thank you, Doctor, and I will see you in Lisbon.

Let me tell you my plan for the congress in Lisbon. I am going to travel next month, and I have already started the arrangements. First, I am going to finish my registration this week, before the deadline. I have a booking at a small hotel near the venue, so I will walk to the sessions every morning. My departure is early on Sunday, and my flight lands in the afternoon. I am not going to take much luggage, only one small bag, because I want to move quickly. On the first day, I will attend the keynote about diabetes, and then I am going to meet two colleagues for dinner. If I have free time, I will explore the old city. I think this trip is going to be very productive, and I am sure I will learn a lot.

extra_audio.text: Here is the order of my plan. First, I am going to complete my registration before the deadline. Then I will confirm my hotel booking near the venue. After that, I am going to buy my flight and check my departure time. Next, I will prepare my luggage the night before. Finally, on the first morning, I am going to attend the keynote.
